description: GIVEN a user is entitled for MLBN

steps.action: WHEN a user initiates MLBN playback from the Home page
steps.data:
2 MGW/graphql calls made → 

* initplaybacksession (which includes dapi - {{mlbn-linear}} info)
* contentCollections
!xray-attachment://aae0afd1-32cd-47b4-8cc7-9828819856f6|width=1492,height=1102!
steps.result:
THEN the stream is assigned a gsId (the gsId will display in the lower right corner of the screen in non-Prod environments)
AND mid-roll ads are played during commercial breaks
AND mid-roll ads do not play during the game outside the commercial breaks
